narrative: Before-Takeoff checklist completed at runway 28 hold-short. Flight controls free + correct, ailerons elevator rudder all full travel. Flight instruments + altimeters set to 30.12. Trim set for takeoff per stab indicator green band. Flaps set 10 degrees per V-speeds. Fuel quantity 32 gal left + 30 gal right; fuel selector BOTH. Engine run-up at 1700 RPM, mag check left 75 RPM drop, right 60 RPM drop (within limits, no split). Transponder squawk 1200 ALT, strobes + landing light on. Takeoff briefing: V1/Vr 60 KIAS V2 70 KIAS; abort criteria — any anomaly below rotation, runway 28 5200 feet available; departure runway heading climb to 3000.
